mapper.insert: MERGE INTO TB_FOLLOW F USING ( SELECT #{userNumb} AS USER_NUMB , #{flowNumb} AS FLOW_NUMB FROM DUAL ) S ON (F.USER_NUMB = S.USER_NUMB AND F.FLOW_NUMB = S.FLOW_NUMB) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_NUMB, FLOW_NUMB, REGI_DATE) VALUES (S.USER_NUMB, S.FLOW_NUMB, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT /* getLikeDtl */ R.TAGT_TYPE , R.TAGT_NUMB , NVL(LC.LIKE_CNT, 0) AS LIKE_CNT , NVL(UL.LIKE_YSNO, #{commNo}) AS LIKE_YSNO FROM ( SELECT #{tagtType} AS TAGT_TYPE , #{tagtNumb} AS TAGT_NUMB FROM DUAL ) R LEFT JOIN ( SELECT L.TAGT_TYPE , L.TAGT_NUMB , COUNT(*) AS LIKE_CNT FROM TB_LIKEXX L WHERE L.TAGT_TYPE = #{tagtType} AND L.TAGT_NUMB = #{tagtNumb} GROUP BY L.TAGT_TYPE, L.TAGT_NUMB ) LC ON LC.TAGT_TYPE = R.TAGT_TYPE AND LC.TAGT_NUMB = R.TAGT_NUMB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT L.TAGT_TYPE , L.TAGT_NUMB , #{commYes} AS LIKE_YSNO FROM TB_LIKEXX L WHERE L.TAGT_TYPE = #{tagtType} AND L.TAGT_NUMB = #{tagtNumb} AND L.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} ) UL ON UL.TAGT_TYPE = R.TAGT_TYPE AND UL.TAGT_NUMB = R.TAGT_NUMB
